prompt: Please do the task stated in `/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2_generation_prompts.md`, where the TASK_ID is `bf32578f`.
codex_response:
Implemented `bf32578f` as a new ARC2 task package. The rule is: mirror the given left-half outline across the vertical line immediately to its right, then keep only the enclosed interior. The `opus46` hint matched the official examples, `sonnet45` had no entry, so I used the hint and did not add a `notes.md`. No new DSL primitive was needed.

Code is in [__init__.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_bf32578f/__init__.py#L1), [verifier.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_bf32578f/verifier.py#L4), and [generator.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_bf32578f/generator.py#L4). The verifier mirrors the observed outline row-by-row and fills the gap between left and mirrored right boundaries; the generator samples symmetric filled shapes, derives their true outline, and crops the left half so the produced inputs stay in-family, including the hidden steeper-step case.

Validation passed end-to-end: official examples `4/4`, generated examples `1000/1000`. Artifacts are at [task.json](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/bf32578f/task.json), [originals.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/bf32578f/previews/originals.png), [preview_01.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/bf32578f/previews/preview_01.png), [preview_02.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/bf32578f/previews/preview_02.png), and [preview_03.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/bf32578f/previews/preview_03.png). I also sanity-checked representative generated grids and a coarse in-terminal rendering of `preview_01.png`; the distribution looks consistent with the official family.
